query:
INSERT INTO projects (name, description, clientId, status, createdById, createdByRole, notificationFrequency, currentStep, companyProfile, operationProfile, taxComplexity, financialProfile, governanceProfile)
VALUES (
  'Projeto Teste v2.1 Persistência',
  'Empresa de tecnologia SaaS para testar persistência dos campos do Company Profile na v2.1 da plataforma de compliance tributário.',
  1,
  'rascunho',
  1,
  'equipe_solaris',
  'semanal',
  1,
  '{"cnpj":"12.345.678/0001-95","companyType":"ltda","companySize":"media","taxRegime":"lucro_presumido","foundingYear":2015,"stateUF":"SP","employeeCount":"51-200"}',
  '{"operationType":"servico","clientType":["B2B","B2C"],"multiState":true,"geographicScope":"nacional"}',
  '{"hasMultipleEstablishments":false,"hasImportExport":false,"hasSpecialRegimes":false}',
  '{"paymentMethods":["cartao_credito","pix"],"hasIntermediaries":false}',
  '{"hasTaxTeam":true,"hasAudit":false,"hasTaxIssues":false}'
);

SELECT id, name,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.cnpj') as cnpj,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.taxRegime') as taxRegime,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.companyType') as companyType,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.companySize') as companySize,
  JSON_EXTRACT(operationProfile, '$.operationType') as operationType,
  JSON_EXTRACT(operationProfile, '$.clientType') as clientType,
  JSON_EXTRACT(operationProfile, '$.multiState') as multiState,
  JSON_EXTRACT(taxComplexity, '$.hasMultipleEstablishments') as hasMultipleEstablishments,
  JSON_EXTRACT(financialProfile, '$.paymentMethods') as paymentMethods,
  JSON_EXTRACT(governanceProfile, '$.hasTaxTeam') as hasTaxTeam
FROM projects
WHERE name = 'Projeto Teste v2.1 Persistência';
